meaning: adj.有膝一般的关节的,有节的
examples: He kneed his attacker in the groin.
He would need all his authority to keep the weak-kneed volunteers from bolting.
You kneed me in my misters!
That emphasis, in turn, has diverted what was already weak-kneed attention to history, literature, art, etc.
On he capers, knock-kneed, curly-shoed, spindly-legged in awful black tights, like something out of the Beano!
